name: Double Cheese Wheel
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Marinated Artichoke Hearts (drained and chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any wax coating or rind from the cheese.
2. Hollow out the cheese, leaving a 1/2-inch thick shell on the sides and bottom. Reserve the cheese shell.
3. Finely chop enough of the scooped-out cheese to measure 1 cup. Reserve any extra for another use.
4. Place the chopped cheese, cream cheese, artichoke hearts, pine nuts, and basil in a food processor fitted with the steel blade. Process until well mixed.
5. Pack the mixture into the cheese shell.
6. Sprinkle with remaining pine nuts.
7. Press lightly.
8. Cover and refrigerate until the filling is firm, about 3 hours.
9. Cut into thin wedges. Serve with assorted crackers if desired.
